001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.scheduler;
002
003import java.util.ArrayList;
004import java.util.Iterator;
005import java.util.List;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007
008/**
009 * Represents the tick based task scheduler.
010 */
011public abstract class AbstractScheduler {
012    private final List<Task> tasks = new ArrayList<>();
013
014    /**
015     * Create a new scheduler.
016     */
017    public AbstractScheduler() {
018        // Empty constructor to pacify javadoc lint
019    }
020
021    /**
022     * Register the scheduler so it starts ticking.
023     */
024    public abstract void register();
025
026    /**
027     * Tick the scheduler.
028     */
029    protected void tick() {
030        Iterator<Task> iter = this.tasks.iterator();
031        while (iter.hasNext()) {
032            Task task = iter.next();
033            if (task.tick++ < task.delay) {
034                continue;
035            }
036            if (task.cancelled()) {
037                iter.remove();
038                continue;
039            }
040            task.run();
041            if (task.repeat) {
042                task.tick = 0;
043                continue;
044            }
045            iter.remove();
046        }
047    }
048
049    /**
050     * Cancel all scheduled tasks.
051     */
052    public void cancelAll() {
053        Iterator<Task> iter = this.tasks.iterator();
054        while (iter.hasNext()) {
055            iter.next().cancel();
056            iter.remove();
057        }
058    }
059
060    /**
061     * Add task to the scheduler.
062     *
063     * @param task Task to add
064     */
065    public void addTask(@NotNull Task task) {
066        this.tasks.add(task);
067    }
068
069    /**
070     * Add non-repeating task to the scheduler to run on the next tick.
071     *
072     * @param runnable Task to add
073     */
074    public void addTask(@NotNull Runnable runnable) {
075        addTask(0, runnable);
076    }
077
078    /**
079     * Add non-repeating task to the scheduler with delay.
080     *
081     * @param delay    Delay (in ticks) before task runs
082     * @param runnable Task to add
083     */
084    public void addTask(int delay, @NotNull Runnable runnable) {
085        addTask(delay, false, runnable);
086    }
087
088    /**
089     * Add task to the scheduler.
090     *
091     * @param delay    Delay (in ticks) before task runs
092     * @param repeat   Whether task should start again after running
093     * @param runnable Task to add
094     */
095    public void addTask(int delay, boolean repeat, @NotNull Runnable runnable) {
096        addTask(new Task(delay, repeat) {
097            @Override
098            public void run() {
099                runnable.run();
100            }
101        });
102    }
103}
